ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size standard */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country associated with the size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label used for the size standard (e.g., XXS, XS) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the conversion entry */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard ID */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label for the current country */,
  "conversion" TEXT /* Equivalent size label in other countries */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock (e.g., warehouse or store) */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the item reaches the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard for the item sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the return transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the return */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item returned */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard for the item returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "return_time" TEXT /* Time of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the return has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer (e.g., member, non-member) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time of the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard for the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the day */,
  "total_returns" REAL /* Total returns for the day */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales for the day (total sales - total returns) */,
  "top-selling_item" TEXT /* Top-selling item of the day */,
  "worst-selling_item" TEXT /* Worst-selling item of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer comments on the item */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the company to the customer's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_size_standards" (
  "region_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region-size standard mapping */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_standards_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id")
)
